sales.description:
MICHAEL VIII, 1261-1282 (EMPEROR OF NICAEA 1258-61). EL Hyperpyron (4.07 gms), Constantinople Mint. NGC Ch VF, Strike: 4/5 Surface: 2/5. Graffiti, Brushed.
To view all items from the John P. Burnham Collection, click  here.
S-2242. Obverse: Bust of Virgin Mary, orans, within city walls with six groups of towers; Reverse: Emperor kneeling slightly to right, being presented by Archangel Michael to Christ enthroned slightly to left and holding scroll in his left hand.

From the John P. Burnham Co...
